query: SELECT npc.id, npc.code, npc.name, npc.title, npc.map_node_id, n.name as node_name, n.lat, n.lng FROM game_npc_catalog npc LEFT JOIN game_map_nodes n ON npc.map_node_id = n.id WHERE npc.id > 53 ORDER BY npc.map_node_id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT npc.id, npc.code, npc.name, npc.title, npc.map_node_id, n.name as node_name, n.lat, n.lng FROM game_npc_catalog npc LEFT JOIN game_map_nodes n ON npc.map_node_id = n.id WHERE npc.id > 53 ORDER BY npc.map_node_id
